title: House Robber
pattern: Dynamic Programming â€” 1D DP with Adjacent Exclusion
coreIdea: Maximize total loot from robbing houses in a row without robbing two adjacent houses, by at each house choosing the better of skipping it (keep previous best) or robbing it (current value plus best from two houses back).
recognitionCues: asks to maximize a sum subject to 'cannot pick two adjacent elements' constraint
array represents values at positions in a row
approach: Track prev1 (best up to previous house) and prev2 (best up to two houses back). For each house, current = max(prev1, prev2 + house_value), then shift tracking variables forward.
